description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with extensive use of horizontal wooden slats on its exterior, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The upper level includes a spacious rooftop terrace with lounge chairs and a sun deck, partially covered by a pergola structure. A swimming pool and a circular hot tub are integrated into the outdoor living area, surrounded by planters and minimalistic landscaping. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows and glass railings provide ample natural light and unobstructed views from the interior. The ground level includes a sheltered carport and a main entryway, with additional greenery and a paved driveway. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story house with wood slat cladding, a rooftop terrace, pool, and large glass windows, designed for open, luxurious urban living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with horizontal wood slats, large windows, and rooftop terrace with lounge chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the pool area with glass railings and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, hot tub, outdoor dining area, and extensive greenery along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, terrace, and the continuation of the wood slat exterior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under the upper level, featuring a minimalist door, no visible steps, and a sheltered carport with landscaping.
